GUI-based Python code generator for Google Colab as an extension

Visual Python is a GUI-based Python code generator for Google Colab as an extension.
Visual Python is an open source project started for students who struggle with coding during Python classes for data science.

OpenRPA is the first completely free, open source, enterprise grade Robotic Process Automation platform.
This plugin is needed in order to automate chrome with OpenRPA, the addon does nothing without a running instance of OpenRPA running at the same time.
The addon needs very broad permissions in order to record and replay sequences.
This addon does not collect and send any information, you can how ever collect information from webpages using the OpenRPA software.

Enjoy the convenience of hassle-free auto Right Click Absolute Enable Copy Extension. Seamlessly operating in the background, it…

Enjoy the convenience of hassle-free auto Right Click Absolute Enable Copy Extension. Seamlessly operating in the background, it effortlessly enables essential functions like select, copy, copy images, inspect, paste, etc., automatically upon activation on specific domains/web pages. No manual toggling needed - it's always primed to enhance your browsing experience with right-click functionality.

Furthermore, this extension adapts to all types of text styles and conditions, allowing you to copy and paste images as well as all sorts of content. When pasting within existing text, it seamlessly adopts the existing text style, color, size, shape, and more, ensuring a smooth integration of copied content.
Adds a windowed fullscreen button to all videos.

Works with most websites that include videos through the HTML5 <video> tag, including videos that are embedded through iFrames and videos on websites that use shadow roots.

Options: Enable / disable the extension for specific websites, and adjust button positioning so it doesn't interfere with other video overlays.

You may report websites that are not compatible with this extension, but this usually happens due to websites being coded in exceptionally weird ways, so it might not always be possible for me to fix the problem. Please blame the website and not the extension :-)

Get started in seconds. No signup, no setup, just install and improve your AI prompts.

SUPPORT & FEEDBACK

Welcome to Top Speed, our automotive new tab filled with automotive news, new model reviews, and stunning HD wallpapers, such as the Nissan Skyline GTR, Lamborghini, Ferrari, BMW, JDM Cars, and many more.

From the latest electric vehicle manufacturers, such as Tesla and Lucid, to the classic JDM (Japanese Domestic Market) modified hot wheels, like Honda, Mitsubishi, and Subaru, Top Speed extension offers you super sports car wallpapers in every new tab and allows you to customize your new tab. You will learn about the breaking auto industry news and car culture, learn about cutting-edge technologies and features, and read about the hottest reviews and buyer’s guides of all kinds of cars.

With the numerous car wallpapers, you can treat the new tab as your dream garage and select whichever pleases you. Every time a new tab is opened, you will be greeted with another new car wallpaper.

Searching the web has never been so flexible and easy with Bing, and your frequently visited websites will appear as shortcuts for faster browsing experiences.

Top Speed New Tab is inspiring, safe, and, most of all, free! Unleash your passion for sports cars and own your dream garage today.

Lightkey’s AI-powered text prediction algorithm learns your typing patterns to enable prediction of up to 18 words including punctuation marks. In addition, Lightkey’s grammar and spelling correction technology will correct your mistakes in real-time, helping you to preserve your line of thought and keep you focused on your message. 

Features:
- Predicts up to 18 words, including punctuation marks.
- Utilizing hundreds of grammar rules to offer real-time spelling and grammar corrections
- Learns your unique writing style, and gradually delivers a highly personalized experience with over 60 industry-oriented content domains.
- Supports over 80 languages.
- Extended support for non-touch typists (visually focused on the keyboard while typing)
- Intuitive dashboard helps you unlock your key productivity metrics

Disclaimer: Faircado uses an affiliate model, meaning the links you click on a product listing are affiliated. Open-source attention saver for the web (YouTube, Instagram, ... or any other site!).

ReDD Focus (formerly Viking Focus & MindShield) is an open-source browser extension we built to help ourselves be less distracted online. 

It lets you hide distracting elements on any website, with pre-configured options for a number of sites, including YouTube, LinkedIn, and Instagram. For example, on YouTube you might want to hide recommended videos, on Facebook you might hide the newsfeed and ads in the sidebar, and on Google Search you might want to hide or highligt ads.

You have full control over what is hidden. Simply click the extension icon in the browser toolbar to select elements to hide, and save your preferred settings. To help hold yourself accountable, you can also add a delay time to change the settings.

Enjoy!

- Ulrik, Konrad, Tiago, and the Reduce Digital Distraction Project (reddfocus.org)

NOTE: the extension is open source and collects zero user data. See the source code, flag bugs, or submit suggestions for improvement at https://github.com/ulyngs/reddfocus-open-source
The church calendar and links to the verses of the Bible and the Holy Fathers and church writers specified in the texts.

The extension has two main functions:
1) Replaces the biblical references found on the web page with hyperlinks. Hyperlinks lead to the site of the Orthodox encyclopedia "ABC of belief" - https://azbyka.ru. The extension detects links in Russian. Examples: Мф. 1:3, Деян. 6:1-10, Откр. 1, 5.

2) Shows the Orthodox church calendar with details for the current day. Holidays, the saints of the day, the icon of the day, reading the Holy Scripture, and more.
An extension to permit copy and paste on sites that block this feature.

Some websites block your ability to copy and paste text and content from them, this extension works to prevent these restrictions from being added.

There are two features to attempt to remove the restrictions available with this extension. You can navigate to the page you'd like to copy/paste from and click the extension icon in Chrome and then "Allow Copy/Paste". Generally this should work for most sites and allow you to carry on like normal. The extension will also store your preferences so you'll only need to do this once for each site.

However, if that doesn't work you can also open Chrome Developer Tools and select the "Allow Copy/Paste" tab which will then give you a button to reload the page and attempt to prevent the blocking script from being added. https://developer.chrome.com/docs/devtools/open
Official Deepbrid.com browser extension. Access your account, manage downloads and detect supported links directly in your browser.

Deepbrid – Browser Extension is the official helper tool for Deepbrid.com.

With this extension you can:
• Get all services from Deepbrid in one place.
• Check your Deepbrid account status, limits and expiration date directly from the browser toolbar.
• Manage and organize your downloads with a clean interface.
• Detect supported links and folders on the websites you visit and open them directly with your Deepbrid account.
• Access history, hoster status, and settings without leaving your current page.

This extension does not download or stream content on its own. It simply provides a quick interface between your browser and your Deepbrid.com account.

Privacy Policy:
This extension does not collect or share any personal data. It only communicates with Deepbrid.com to display account information and user-initiated downloads.
This chrome extension enbales proctoring on Hire3x Assessments.

We are Hire3x, a company that connects companies and academic institutions with comprehensive talent insights, helping them make more informed recruiting and development decisions.

This Chrome extension allows proctoring on Hire3x Assessments.

It's Time to Say Goodbye to Online Exam Cheating! 

Cheating is a significant major stumbling block to recruiting professionals, teachers, and entrance exam proctors. Each year, high stakes examinations are administered; these examinations may be carried out once, twice, or even three times a year. Paying a test invigilator for each test will add to the physical difficulties. As a result, it's only reasonable that a tool like online proctoring would ease a significant strain on exam administrators.

Today's technology enables exam administrators, educators, and recruiters to hear and witness exam candidates thousands of miles away. With our Advanced Proctoring Feature, Hire3x equips these exam administrators, educators, and recruiters with the technology necessary to accomplish the same.

Test administrators can get insights about tab & window switches, dual monitor setup and virtual machine information of test taker using this extension.
Check the HTML start and end tags for problems.

This extension displays errors in the HTML code of the page you are viewing, such as mistakes in the opening and closing tags.

## Main Features
- Displays results in a separate tab
- Shows the number of errors on the icon
- Automatic checking
- Settings for sites you want to automatically check
- Exclusion settings for specified sites
- Custom warning rules
- HTML File Analysis

## Caution
The code is checked using JavaScript, so no data is sent externally. 
Behavior may be unpredictable on pages that use forms, such as login screens.

Product scraper for Woocommerce - Extract products and collection in just one click

Woocommerce Scraper is a powerful product exporting extension. It allows you to export product data from any Woocommerce store to a file in csv format.

## Intro

Woocommerce Scraper is a powerful extension for Woocommerce. It allows you to export Shopify product data to csv file with one click.

## Traits
Export products for Shopify or Woocommerce
Export products from selected collections
Export selected products
Search and export the corresponding products
View product details

# It's free?

Yes, Woocommerce Scraper is free. You can get basic functionality and upgrade to get more functionality.

# Data confidentiality
All product data is processed in your local computer, it never goes through our web server, no one knows what you have discarded.

Questions? Write to us at the email address: woocommerce.scraper.com@gmail.com or directly on our site from this link https://woocommerce-scraper.com/contact

# IMPORTANT NOTE:
Woocommerce Scraper is in no way in partnership with the official Woocommerce site. It is an unofficial application which is independently developed and maintained.

privacy policy

JARVIS Voice Assistant can help you with your daily tasks on web

Introducing JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC: Your Personal Digital Marvel

JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC is your all-in-one digital companion designed to make your everyday life easier and more exciting. With a touch of Tony Stark flair, JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC boasts an impressive array of features:

1. Time and Date Guru: Ask Jarvis for the current time, date, and day, or even inquire about specific days like today, yesterday, and tomorrow. It can also provide insights into the year, next year, and last year with precision.

2. Knowledge and Engagement: Jarvis is a fountain of knowledge, ready to answer your basic questions, engage in conversations, and keep you informed.

3. Instant Access: Seamlessly open websites, launch the calculator app, start Spotify for your favorite tunes, access Visual Studio Code for coding, or even connect with friends on WhatsApp, all at your command.

4. Weather Wizard: Get real-time weather updates, including temperature and Air Quality Index (AQI), so you're always prepared for the day ahead.

5. Personalization: Feel like a tech genius as you customize your AI assistant's name, giving it a unique identity that suits your style and preferences.

JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC is your ticket to streamlined productivity, entertainment, and information, all while enjoying a touch of Tony Stark's brilliance. It's time to embrace the future with your own digital marvel!
음성을 빠르고 정확하게 텍스트로 변환하는 서비스입니다.

모든 음성을 다 글로! 

YouTube 영상을 텍스트로 자막이나 문서를 만들 수 있습니다. 
받아쓴 결과는 다글로 홈페이지에서 확인할 수 있으며, 
웹 편집기를 통해 내용을 빠르게 수정하거나, 
찾고자 하는 본문 내용을 쉽게 검색할 수 있습니다. 

주요 기능 : 
- 유튜브 음성 다글로 받아쓰기 요청 
- 한국어 포함 14개 국어 지원 

사용 방법 : 
1. Chrome 웹 스토어에서 daglo를 설치합니다. 
2. 유튜브에서 영상을 조회하면 daglo 확장 프로그램이 활성화 됩니다. 
3. daglo 로그인 후 영상 하단 받아쓰기 버튼을 눌러 해당 영상을 텍스트로 받아씁니다. 
4. 받아쓰기 요청이 완료되며, 다글로 웹 사이트(https://daglo.ai)에서 받아쓴 결과를 확인할 수 있습니다. 

문의 이메일 : cs@daglo.ai 
홈페이지 : https://daglo.ai/

Site Blocker: Stay focused & Block websites
Boost productivity by features: scheduled site blocking, password protection and custom blocklist.

Maintain concentration and minimize distractions using a site blocker! Take advantage of personalized blocklists and password security to manage your internet usage.

If you frequently find yourself getting absorbed in the endless depths of the internet, employing a site blocker can offer an ideal remedy. Establish a specific time limit for distracting websites, and once that limit is reached, the site blocker will step in and prevent you from squandering any more time.

Tailored to enhance productivity and eliminate diversions, a site blocker will effectively eradicate all time-consuming websites from your life, enabling you to dedicate your attention to studying, learning, and working.

Why do you need Block Site extension?

🚫 Block sites by URL: 
Add any specific website URLs that you want to block. This will prevent you from accessing those websites and help you stay focused.

🔤 Block sites by words: 
Block specific words that appear in the website's URL.

⏰ Schedule blocking: 
Schedule website blocking at specific times. You can set up a schedule to block certain websites during work hours and then unblock them during your break time.

🔐 Password protection: 
With password protection, you can keep yourself focused by protecting the settings and blocked pages you create with a password. This prevents you from being tempted to lose your productivity and focus by easily accessing blocked websites without authorization.

🔞Adult content:
Ever wanted to block adult content? With the extension you can do so easily. Our adult blocker removes all adult sites by default making sure that you don’t see any inappropriate or unwanted content.

Block website stands out as one of the top productivity tools available, empowering you to minimize procrastination, enhance productivity, and realize your life goals. With a site blocker at your disposal, you can bid farewell to distractions and stay focused with ease!

Your suggestions can make Site block and Focus mode even better. Share your ideas through feedback on extension web store.

Visualize client-side vs server-side rendered content for SEO. Per-element CSR/SSR breakdown, performance signals, and minimap.

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟐.𝟎 (𝐀𝐮𝐠𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓)
• Elements tab with stacked SSR/CSR breakdown and per-category insights
• One‑click PDF report export (includes donut chart and element breakdown)
• Performance tab with live signals (TTFB, FCP, LCP, CLS, TBT) and request waterfall
• Color‑blind palettes and accessibility settings (persisted per user)

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟏.𝟏 𝐔𝐩𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞:
• Improved user experience: Extension now only works on the active tab
• New feature: Doughnut chart showing estimated CSR vs SSR percentages
• Performance enhancements and bug fixes

▶ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬:
• Identifies potentially client-side rendered content
• Highlights potentially problematic areas in red
• Provides an approximate percentage of the page that might be client-side rendered
• Simplifies technical SEO discussions with developers

▶ 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐦 𝐢𝐭 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐬:
This extension suggests which parts of a webpage might be rendered on the client side, which can be less visible to search engines and potentially impact website rankings. As an SEO professional, you can use these insights to guide your investigation in Google Search Console, where you should inspect the page's indexed code and check for the suggested elements.

▶ 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐮𝐬𝐞:
1- Install the Chrome extension
2- Toggle it on when viewing a webpage
3- Analyze the highlighted areas and percentage to identify potentially client-side rendered content
4- Use these insights to guide your inspection in Google Search Console

⚠ 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞:  While this tool provides valuable insights, it's not 100% accurate. Use it as a hint to inform your SEO strategy, but always conduct further analysis in Google Search Console for comprehensive optimization.
